pi_items.source: setup_task.sh writes 'Star: Mintaka (Delta Orionis)' to pec_work_order.txt
setup_task.sh writes 'RA: 05h 32m 00s' which is exactly 5.5333 hours. Also used as default in verifier.py
setup_task.sh writes 'Dec: -00d 17m 57s' which is exactly -0.299 degrees. Also used as default in verifier.py
setup_task.sh explicitly writes 'absolute focus to exactly 31500' to the work order
setup_task.sh specifies 'Capture at least 40 consecutive frames' and verifier enforces this minimum
setup_task.sh specifies the report must be created at '/home/ga/Documents/pec_summary.txt'
verifier.py docstring explicitly lists this occupation
Task context in setup_task.sh ('MAINTENANCE WORK ORDER') aligns with this industry

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated parameters injected via setup scripts. It has been verified that the expected telescope target (Mintaka at RA 5.5333h, Dec -0.299°), focuser position (31500), filter slot (2), output directory (/home/ga/Images/pec_run) with at least 40 FITS frames, and final report path (/home/ga/Documents/pec_summary.txt) match the exact requirements specified in the synthetic work order and verifier evaluation constraints.
